author: NETWORG
name: Power Platform: Site Map Area Group SubArea
description: Adds <SubArea> to a sitemap group: Id, Entity reference, Client=All/Outlook/Web, AvailableOffline=true, PassParams=false, Sku=All. Leaf navigation item linking to an entity list.

EntityLogicalName.description: Logical name of the entity including publisher prefix (e.g., udpp_warehouseitem)

SolutionRootPath.description: Relative path from the project folder (.csproj) to the folder containing unpacked Dataverse solution files (Other/, Entities/, OptionSets/). Use '.' if solution files are directly in the project folder, or a subfolder name like 'Declarations'. Do not use 'Entities' or 'Other' — those are subdirectories inside the solution metadata root.

GroupTitle.description: Title of the group in the sitemap where the subarea will be added

AreaTitle.description: Title of the area in the sitemap where the subarea will be added

AppName.description: Name of the app module including publisher prefix (e.g., udpp_warehouseapp)

manualInstructions.text: Adding Model Driven App to solution xml

postActions.description: Generate ID for app module site map
